mnemonics: Jailbroken Cats Always Vanish (JC AV) - Joint Counts, Additive Smoothing, and Vectors are key steps.
keyPoints: Calculate feature counts (joint counts) for each class.
Apply additive smoothing (Laplace smoothing) to avoid zero probabilities.
Convert counts to probability vectors for classification.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to apply Laplace smoothing, leading to zero probabilities for unseen words.
Incorrectly assuming feature independence, which is the 'naive' part of the classifier.
Mishandling the prior probability of classes, which can bias the model.
